scripts.dev:gateway: nodemon --watch api-gateway/src --watch libs/common/src --ext ts --exec "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -P api-gateway/tsconfig.json api-gateway/src/app.ts"
scripts.dev:user: nodemon --watch user-service/src --watch proto --ext ts,proto --exec "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -P user-service/tsconfig.json user-service/src/app.ts"
scripts.dev:notification: nodemon --watch notification-service/src --watch proto --ext ts,proto --exec "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -P notification-service/tsconfig.json notification-service/src/app.ts"
scripts.build: npm run build:gateway && npm run build:user && npm run build:notification
